reminders.weight: 🏋️ 早上好！该称体重啦~ 记得告诉我今天的体重哦！
reminders.breakfast: 🍳 早餐吃了吗？吃完记得告诉我吃了什么~ {suggestion}
reminders.lunch: 🍱 午饭时间到！吃完记得告诉我吃了什么~ {suggestion}
reminders.dinner: 🌙 晚餐时间到！吃完告诉我吃了什么~ {suggestion}
reminders.water: 💧 该喝水啦！今天还差 {remaining} ml，目标 {target} ml~
reminders.preworkout: ⚡ 练前餐时间！距离训练还有1小时，吃点碳水+少量蛋白质充能吧~ 建议：全麦面包+香蕉 / 米饭+鸡蛋

suggestions.protein_low: 蛋白质还差 {gap}g，这顿重点补！推荐：鸡蛋 / 鸡胸肉 / 牛肉
suggestions.carbs_full: 碳水接近上限，后面避开主食
suggestions.carbs_low: 碳水还有空间，可以适当补充
suggestions.fat_full: 脂肪接近上限，选低脂食物
suggestions.fat_low: 脂肪还有空间，可以适当补充
suggestions.rest_day: 今天休息日，吃够营养好好恢复就行~
suggestions.train_day: 今天训练日，碳水要吃够有力气练！
suggestions.calories_low: 热量还剩不少，别饿着自己！

zh.record_template:
✅ 已记录：{food} ({calories} kcal)
📊 今日进度：{consumed}/{target} kcal
   蛋白质 {protein}/{protein_target}g | 碳水 {carbs}/{carbs_target}g | 脂肪 {fat}/{fat_target}g
💡 {suggestion}
zh.food_not_found: 食物库里没找到 {food}，我帮你估一下~
zh.water_done: 今天喝水已达标，太棒了！💧

reminders.weight: 🏋️ Good morning! Time to weigh in~ Tell me your weight today!
reminders.breakfast: 🍳 Had breakfast? Tell me what you ate~ {suggestion}
reminders.lunch: 🍱 Lunch time! Tell me what you had~ {suggestion}
reminders.dinner: 🌙 Dinner time! Tell me what you ate~ {suggestion}
reminders.water: 💧 Time to hydrate! {remaining} ml to go, target {target} ml~
reminders.preworkout: ⚡ Pre-workout meal time! Fuel up with carbs + a bit of protein~ Suggestion: whole wheat bread + banana / rice + eggs

suggestions.protein_low: Still need {gap}g protein! Load up on: eggs / chicken breast / beef
suggestions.carbs_full: Carbs almost at limit, skip the starch
suggestions.fat_full: Fats almost at limit, choose low-fat options
suggestions.rest_day: Rest day — eat well and recover~
suggestions.train_day: Training day — fuel up on carbs for energy!
suggestions.calories_low: Plenty of calories left, don't starve yourself!
